goal: Textual TUI scaffold. Create scripts/conduit_tui/: app.py (root, screens dict), conversation_screen.py (You-said + LLM-said + char-timeline DataTable + status bar), mic_capture.py (sounddevice InputStream → Deepgram WS queue), deepgram_client.py (WS streaming, interim_results+punctuate, word-level → char interpolator), char_timeline.py (append-only JSONL char/start/end/notes dataclass), groq_client.py, elevenlabs_client.py (with_timestamps endpoint for native char-level timing), orchestrator.py (conversation loop). Pattern-match from slm_learning/scripts/learning_tui/.
